WITN10550100
WITN10550100

Witness Name: David Sutherland
Teale Statement No. WITN10550100
Dated 3 January 2024

POST OFFICE HORIZON IT INQUIRY

FIRST WITNESS STATEMENT OF DAVID SUTHERLAND TEALE

I, David Sutherland Teale, will say as follows:-

Introduction

1. I am a former employee of the Crown Office and Procurator Fiscal Service and held the position of Procurator Fiscal at Lochmaddy.

2. This witness statement is made to assist the Post Office Horizon IT Inquiry with the matters set out in Rule 9 Request dated 8 December 2023, which relates to matters falling within Phase 4 of the Inquiry.

3. I have been asked to set out my involvement as Procurator Fiscal in the prosecution of William Quarm.

Background

Page 1 of 13
